def: v. n. 1. To lie down ( ārām k. , 1, 2). 2. To lie prostrate. Khetī leṭ gaī . 3. To fall at one's feet; prostrate oneself. 4. To give in; yield; submit. 5. To become thin or sloppy; to melt. Guṛ leṭ gayā .

ety: Prk. लेवो; S. लेप, rt. लिप्
def: s.m. Plastor; old plaster which comes off a wall
more: E. n. m. The plaster which comes off a wall. Bhitieṅ levan, buṛhveṅ jevan . Bhoj. Prov. Plaster for walls, food for old men. leo chaṛhnā , v. n. 1. To be put on (plaster). 2. To grow fat. Bhīt hogī to leo butere chaṛh raheṅge . Hin. Wom. Prov. While the wall stands it can receive mortar. (While the bones last flesh there will be).
s. m. Plaster falling from a wall. ¶ leʼū or (dakh.) lyau (from لينا) s. or adj. Taker, taking.
subs: (-par), Plaster to be put on; to be plastered; (fig.) flesh to be put on, to grow fat.

def: s.m. Plaster ( = leʼo); the ashes or earth which is spread on the outside of a new cooking-vessel; — an udder.
more: s. m. 1. (from لينا) Taker. 2. (from लेप ) Plaster, that which is spread on the outside of a new pot. 3. Udder.

def: s.m. One who takes, taker, &c. (see lenā); — taking, receiving, &c. ( = len, lenā)
s. f. Traffick, trade, taking and giving.
s. f. Traffick, trade, taking and giving.
s.m. = liwaiyā, and lewā, qq.v. s.m. One who takes, a taker.
v.t. (rustic) = liwānā, q.v. v.t. To cause to take
subs: (-ko), 'To take and bring'; to cause to be brought; — to bring, to fetch; to procure

more: s. m. Mud (to plaster a wall with).

def: s.m. Plaster; chunam; stucco.

s.f. A bow with an iron chain instead of a string, with which athletes exercise themselves; a weak bow for practising with (in Pers. also luzūm).
more: n. f. A bow with an iron chain for a bow string, used in athletics. Lezam hilānā .
s. f. A kind of bow with an iron chain instead of a string, with which the natives exercise their bodies.

def: adj. = lais, q.v. adj. Attained to perfection, perfected, completed, finished; ready, prepared (for); dressed; concluded (as a bargain); bought, &c.; — s.m. That by which perfection is attained; an arrow for practising with, an arrow with a knob or button on the head (or with a blunt head, syn. tukkā); — a kind of vinegar (in this sense, perhaps fr. S. amla-rasa); — a sprig, twig (prob. = les, 'a small part').
s.m. Stickiness, &c. ( = les, q.v.). s.m. Smallness, littleness; — a small part or portion, a particle, little bit, slight trace; mark, sign, effect (cf. S. laksham); — adj. Small, little.
n. m. Stickiness. lhes-dār , adj. Sticky; gummy.
v.t. To besmear, plaster, &c. ( = lesnā, q.v.). v.t. To cause to adhere; to plaster (with mud and dung), to daub over, to smear, to spread; — to cause to burn, to kindle; to foment (a quarrel).
v. a. 1. To plaster; daub. Dīvār ko lhes do! 2. To give one a name that sticks to him.
s.f. = līr, q.v. s.f. A strip or slip of cloth (syn. dhajjī); a rag, tatter, shred
subs: To tear to shreds or pieces
To be in shreds, or rags, or tatters.

def: s.f. = līrī = līr, q.v. s.f. A strip or slip of cloth (syn. dhajjī); a rag, tatter, shred
subs: To tear to shreds or pieces
To be in shreds, or rags, or tatters.

def: s.m. (dialec.) = lohā, q.v. s.m. Iron (either crude or wrought); steel; metal; — a weapon; — blood; — aloe-wood, Agallochum
subs: (˚ha+abh˚), s.m. Name of a military ceremony performed on the tenth day of the light half of the month Aśvin (this ceremony or lustration of arms was formerly observed by kings before commencing a campaign, but is now usually confined to the domestic decoration and worship of the soldiers' weapons)
adj. & s.m. (f. -ī), Loaded with iron; iron-bound; — an iron-bound club; a life-preserver
vulg. lohaj, s.m. Bell-metal; — rust of iron; — iron-filings
s.m. A diamond (lit. 'conquering iron' in hardness)
loh-ćūr, loh-ćūrā, loh-ćūn, loh-ćūrṇ, s.m. Iron-filings
s.f. An iron missile, iron dart, &c.
s.m. (f. -ī), A worker in iron, an iron-smith, a blacksmith; a lock-smith; a cutler (see lohār)
s.m. A kind of thorny shrub, Vanguiera spinosa
s.m. An iron mace or club
s.m. (ʻcalcining metal') The plant Achyranthes triandra
adj. Made of iron, composed or consisting of iron, iron; abounding in iron.

def: s.m. (dialec.) = lohār, q.v. s.m. A worker in iron, a blacksmith, a smith (com. contrac. to luhār, q.v. for compounds).
more: (dakh.) s. m. Blacksmith. لهوار خاني مين سويان بيچنا lhauʼār-ḵẖāne meṅ sūyāṅ bechnā (i. q. بيجا فخر کرنا be-jā faḵẖr karnā ) To boast improperly or out of place (?).

def: s. (dakh.) See لوکٿي lūkṭī.
s.m. Land that is annually flooded.
adj. & s.m. Wise, prudent, intelligent; — the wise, or prudent, &c.
more: adj. plur. (of لبيب) The wise, prudent.

def: s.m. Rheum (of the eyes).

ety: v.n. fr. لبس 'to put on a garment,' &c.
def: s.m. Garment, vesture, raiment, robe, apparel, clothes, dress, attire, habit; appearance; guise; a veil; — forgery
more: n. m. لبس clad. 1. Apparel; raiment; vestment; costume; habit ( poshāk ). Tan ki uryānī se behtar nahīṅ dunyā meṅ libās, Yeh voh jāmā hai ki jiskā nahīṅ sīdhā ulṭā . Ātish. No dress in all the world like naked beauty shows, A garment this which no wrong side doth e'er disclose. 2. Appearance ( bhes , 1). ba-tagaīyur-i-libās jānā , G. G. H. bhes badal-ke jānā . To go in disguise.
(from لبس Heb. and Aram. ) s. m. 1. Apparel, clothes, dress, attire, habit, a veil. 2. Forgery.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian لِباس, from Arabic لِبَاس (libās). Compare Punjabi ਲਿਬਾਸ (libās) / لِباس (libās), Gujarati લિબાસ (libās), લેબાસ (lebās).

def: adj. Veiled; apparent; formal; — fictitious, pretended, false, forged, counterfeit, sham.
more: adj. See du-bhes . 1. Formal; apparent. 2. Fictitious; counterfeit; sham ( jālī , 2).

def: s.m. A slap, buffet.
s.m.(?) Felt-cloth; any kind of carpeting or saddle-cloths made of felt; coarse covering made of wool or hair.
more: s. A felt or coarse covering made of wool or hair. ¶ lubad, s. The last of the seven vultures of Luḳmān. ¶ lubad or lubbad, adj. Much (wealth).

def: Libya (a country in North Africa)
wety: Borrowed from either English Libya or Arabic لِيبِيَا (lībiyā).

adj. (f. -ī), Sticky, clammy; slimy, viscous, glutinous (syn. laslasā); — pliable, flexible; — s.m. The pancreas.

more: n. f. The sear spring of a gun-lock.

more: (Heb. from White) 1. A brick or tile. 2. A mural quadrant.

ety: līćaṛ, q.v. + pan = Prk. प्पणं = S. त्वं (Vedic. त्वनं)
def: s.m. Stinginess, miserliness; slowness in paying one's debts.
adj. Slippery; slow in paying one's debts. līchaṛ , n. m. A bad paymaster. See le-loṭ. līchaṛ-pan . Slowness in paying one's debts.
s.f. = līćī, q.v.
more: n. f. A soft thin cake fried in butter.

def: s.f. The fruit Scytalia litchi (first introduced from China).
more: E. n. m. A fruit; nephelium līchī , Wat.
s. f. Name of a fruit. (Scytalia litchi: Roxb. ).

ety: līć, prob. = S. लीय(ते), rt. ली
def: v.n. To cower, submit, succumb, subside.
more: v. n. To submit, to succumb, to subside.

def: s.m. = līćī, q.v.

ety: prob. Prk. लित्ता; S. लिप्ता, rt. लिप्; lit. 'what is smeared or plastered over'
def: s.f. Dung (of horses, mules, asses, and elephants)
more: n. f. Dung of horses, mules, and elephants. līd k. , v. n. 1. To dung. 2. To make a mess in a place. Haṭ-ke līd karo!
s. f. The dung of horses or elephants.

ety: for A. لفافة lifāfat, v.n. fr. لفّ; see laff
def: s.m. A wrapper, outward case; enclosure; cover of a letter, an envelope; — (fig.) gilding; — whitewash; a gloss; — outward show, ostentation; — anything frail; gingerbread work
more: n. m. لف wrapping. 1. An envelope; the cover of a letter. 2. Outward show; display; ostentation. 3. Gilding; whitewash; a gloss. 4. Anything frail; gingerbread work. lifāfā banānā , v. a. 1. To make an envelope. 2. To make a show or display. lifāfa k. , 1. To close or put into an envelope (for a letter). 2. To gild over glass. lifāfa khulnā , v. n. To be laid bare or open ( qalaī khulnā ). Āj unkā lifāfa khul gayā, ghar meṅ ek kauṛī naniklī. ṭikaṭ-dār lifāfa , A stamped envelope. lifāf'iyā , adj. Showy; ostentatious.
(from لف) s. m. A cover, envelope, enclosure, a wrapper, outward case. لفافه کرنا lifāfa karnā, To wrap up, to enclose.
subs: To make an envelope, &c.; — to make a show or display
v.t. To wrap up, to enclose; to put (a letter) into an envelope; — to gild (glass, &c.)
(-kā), A covering or wrapper, &c. to be opened or removed; (a person or thing) to be laid bare or exposed
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian لِفَافَه (lifāfa), itself from Arabic لِفافَة (lifāfa).

def: direct plural; oblique/vocative singular
adj. Having a gaudy outer cover; showy, ostentatious.
oblique plural of لِفافَہ (lifāfa)
vocative plural of لِفافَہ (lifāfa)
adv. To the end (of); inclusive.
more: adv. 1. Inclusive. 2. To the end of.

more: n. m. لحف to stuff (cotton). A quilt; coverlet ( sauṛ ).
(from لحف) s. m. 1. A coverlet, a quilt, a counterpane. 2. A quilted upper garment. 3. ( met. ) A wife.

def: s.f. Irrigation of land by throwing up water from a lower level (by means of a kind of basket worked by two persons).
n. f. See ḍāl , 2.
adj. Vile, base, mean, contemptible; — a shabby fellow; a lick-penny; a bad paymaster.
E. n. m. A bad paymaster. Woh to baṛā lihāṛā hai, le-ke denā jāntā hī nahīṅ .
adj. Vile, base, mean, contemptible.

ety: inf. n. of لاحظ; iii of لحظ 'to look through half-shut eyes'
def: s.m. Attentive observation, attention, notice, look, glance, view; regard, consideration, respect, sense, deference; importance, weight; shame; respect, reference, relation, advertence
more: n. m. لحظ looking through half shut eyes, or through the outer corner of the eye. See توجه 1. Notice. 2. Deference; importance; weight (ادب). 3. Shame (حيا). Uskī āṅkh meṅ baṛā lihāz hai . 4. Respect; reference; relation; advertence. lihāz uṭhā denā , v. n. To become shameless. lihāz k. , v. a. 1. To notice; take notice of; regard; mind; have regard to ( dekhnā , 2). 2. To defer or pay respect to. 3. To heed; carry out ( khayāl k . 2). 4. To be partial to; side with. lihāz ke qābil , adj. Worthy of attention or consideration. lihāz na k. , v. n. 1. To disregard; turn away from ( khayāl meṅ na lānā ). 2. To lose all sense of shame; to be immodest. lihāz-vālā, lihāz-vālī , adj. Modest. ba-lihāz . With advertence to ( ba-khayāl ). ba-lihāz-i-zurūrat-i-vaqt . G. G. As occasion requires. bilā-lihāz . Without reference to; independently. be-lihāz , adj. Shameless. See بدلحاظ be-lihāzī , n. f. …

(from لحظ) s. m. A look, a glance, view, sense, respect, regard, attention, observation, notice. لحاظ کرنا liḥāz̤ karnā, To observe, behold, look (to or at), advert (to), regard, mind, observe, notice.
subs: To abandon shame, to become shameless
(-ko, or -kā), To behold, look at, regard, notice, observe, consider, have regard to; to mind, heed, attend to; to pay respect to, to defer to; to be partial to, to favour; to refer to, to advert to
To pay no attention (to), to disregard, to turn away (from); — to lose all sense of shame, to be shameless or immodest
adj. (f. -ī), Having a sense of shame; modest
adv. In consideration (of, -ke), considering; in respect (of), with regard (to), with reference or advertence (to)
adj. Inattentive, heedless; shameless; — be-liḥāz̤ī, s.f. Heedlessness; shamelessness.

def: adv. lit . for this reason. Therefore; consequently.
more: (ل li, To, for, and هذا hāẕā, This) For this (reason), because, therefore, consequently.

def: adv. For this reason; because of this; therefore, consequently.

more: Farrukh, n. f. What remains after plastering a floor.
s. f. Dregs (of a die, or of any thing that has been chewed), sediment.

n. f. The afterbirth; the placenta .
adj. (f. -ī), Clammy, sticky, viscous, glutinous; — soft, flaccid, flabby; flexible.

def: s.f. Mark (of a cart-wheel), wheel-track, rut, furrow, groove, path, track, trace; — established practice, custom, usage, order, rule (e.g. bandhī līk); — stain, stigma, ignominy, disgrace
more: n. f. S. रेखा or लेखा 1. Wheel-track; rut. 2. A cart-road. 3. ( baṅdhī līk ) Established practice; custom and usage; custom; order; rule. Līk sir chalnā achchhā hotā hai . 3. ( līk ke ṭake ) The customary fees of barbers, etc. līk se be-līk h. , v. n. To deviate from the common track. līk līk chalnā , v. n. 1. To go in the rut or beaten path. 2. To adhere to old established customs or practices. Līk līk gāṛī chale, aur līk chale kapūt, Līk chhoṛ tīn hī chaleṅ, kavī, singh, sapūt . The cart goes in the ruts, scamps to their father's faults incline, But poets, lions, duteous sons, these three will leave the beaten line. līk pīṭnā , v. a. To cry over spilt milk.
n. f. Eng. lice. S. लिक्षा A nit. līkeṅ paṛnā , v. n. To have nits in the head.
s. f. Marks of a carriage wheel, rut, path, track, trace, stain, ignominy, disgrace.
subs: (-kī), To follow the beaten path, to move in a groove, &c. ( = lakīr pīṭnā, līk-līk ćalnā); — to cry over spilt milk
To deviate from the common track or course
To go or move in a rut or groove; to follow the beaten path; to adhere to old-established customs or practices (syn. lakīr pīṭnā).

v. a. To copy, to write.

ety: perf. part. of likhnā, and = Prk. लिखिअओ = लिखिदओ = S. लिखित+कः, rt. लिख्
def: part. adj. (f. -ī), &s.m. Written, &c.; what has been (or is) written; a writing, written document; decree (of fate); fate, destiny, predestination
more: adj. Written; engrossed. likkhā pūrā k. , v. a. 1. To work out what is written in one's fate. 2. To pass one's days in hardship. likkhā-paṛhā , n. m. One who can read and write; an educated person. uske hāth kā likkhā . His own handwriting. qismat kā likkhā, likkhā , n. m. Fate; destiny. Apne likkhe ko pīṭtī hūṅ .
(part. past of لکهنا likhnā, q. v.) s. m. Fate, predestination, destiny, writing. adj. Written.

or likhā-paṛī, s.f. Reading and writing
(apnā), To fulfil (one's) destiny; to suffer what fate has ordained; to pass (one's) days in hardship

def: s. f. 1. The wages of writing. 2. The labour of writing. 3. The art or business of writing.
s.f. The art or business of writing; the labour of writing; — wages or remuneration for writing or copying.
more: n. f. 1. The art or occupation of writing. 2. The remuneration for writing or copying.
wety: From لکھنا (likhnā, “to write”) + ائی (ā'ī).

def: v.t. To cause to write; to teach to write; to get (a letter, &c.) written.

def: s.m. A writing, &c. ( = likhat or likhit); — fate, destiny; predestination.
s.m. = likhāwaṭ, q.v. s.f. The act of writing; a writing, an inscription; — manner of writing.
more: s. m. (from لکهنا) Act of writing.

def: s.f. (dialec) = likhāwaṭ, q.v. s.f. The act of writing; a writing, an inscription; — manner of writing.
part. Writing; painting, delineating.
more: n. f. 1. Writing; penmanship. 2. Anything written; a letter; a note of hand; a deed; document. Likhtam ke āge baktam nahīṅ chaltī . Prov. The oral has no weight against the written (document). likhat paṛhat h. , v. n. To be reduced to writing (an agreement, etc.). likhat sākshī , n. f. Written evidence; a deed. pichhlī likhat , n. f. An endorsement. likher'ā ; Bhoj. likhak , n. m. A writer; copyist; clerk.

def: n. f. A writing; an inscription.
s.f. The act of writing; a writing, an inscription; — manner of writing.
more: s. f. (from لکهنا) Act of writing.

def: part. & s.m. (but likhat is gen. fem. in Hindī), Written; drawn, delineated, portrayed, sketched, traced, painted; specified; — anything written; writing, penmanship; a written document or composition, a book, manuscript, scripture; a note of hand; a deed; an agreement, a stipulation
subs: To be reduced to writing (an agreement, &c.)

ety: likh˚ = Prk. लिख(इ) = S. लिख(ति), rt. लिख्
def: v.t. To write, to enter, register, note; to copy; to compose (a work, &c.); to delineate, to paint; — s.m. Writing; handwriting
more: v. n. S. लिख् to write, Pr. lih ; Pālī, lekheti . 1. To write; put or set down. 1. Inheṅ bhī likkho . Prov. Set him too down a fool: ☞ Akbar once asked Bīrbal, whether there were more men with eyes or no eyes in the world? Bīrbal replied that there were more blind men in it, and to prove his assertion he set out, accompanied by his writer, and began collecting stones on the road. def: s.m. The world, the universe, a world, a division of the universe (in general three Lokas are enumerated, Svarg-lok, 'heavenʼ, Pātāl, 'hell'; and Mr̤itya-bhavan, 'earth.' Another classification enumerates 1˚ Bhūr-lok, 'earth': 2˚ Svarg-lok, 'heaven'; 3˚ Bhūvar-lok, 'intermediate space.' A fuller classification enumerates fourteen; see Monier Williams' Sanskrit Dictionary, s.v. loka); — region, country, tract, province; — the inhabitants of the world, mankind, people, folk, man, men; a multitude; — seeing, looking; sight; regard
subs: (˚ka+ap˚), s.m. Reproach or censure of the world, general evil report, public scandal; popular accusation or blame; calumny, slander

s.m., or lokāćārī, s.f. (˚ka+ać˚), Usage, practice, or custom of the world, the way of the world (i.q. lok-rīti); common practice, custom of a people; general or popular custom, universal habit; honour or credit of a people
(˚ka+al˚), s.m. The visible and invisible world; — name of a mythical belt of mountains surrounding the outermost of the seven seas and dividing the visible world from the region of darkness
(˚ka+an˚), s.m. Another world; the other world, the next world; a future life; decease, death
adj. Worldly-wise; — s.m. & f. One who knows the ways of the world

or lok-pālak, or loka-pa, s.m. A world-protector; guardian of the world; any presiding deity (especially a class of deities, as Indra, Yam, Varuṇ, Kuver, &c., who are believed to protect the various regions of the universe); — a protector or ruler of the people, a king, sovereign, prince
s.m. Lord of the world; an epithet of Brahmā, and of Vishṇu; — a lord or ruler of people, a king ( = lok-pāl)
adj. Celebrated or notorious in the world; generally established or received, universally known or acknowledged; well-known, notorious
s.m. The three worlds (viz. heaven, earth, and the lower regions), the whole universe
or lok-jīt, s.m. Conqueror of the world; a sage; name of a Buddha
s.m. The spirit of a wicked man converted into a demon
s.m. Pleasing the world; gaining public confidence; popularity
s.f. A numbering of the people; a census
s.m. Creator of the world or universe, an epithet of Brahmā, Vishṇu, and Śiva
s.f. The honour or credit of a people ( = lokāćār)
s.m. Lord of the world; an epithet of Brahmā, Vishṇu (or Krishṇa), and Śiva; — a proper name

def: For this and other compounds of which lok is the first member, see s.v. loka or lok.
more: s. (dakh. i. q. لوگ لاج) Custom of a people, the honour or credit of a people.

def: s.m. Looking, seeing, viewing, beholding.
(Braj), s.m. pl. (of lok, q.v.), Worlds, &c.; — the three worlds ( = loka-tray, q.v.s.v. loka).
part. adj. To be seen or perceived, visible; worthy of being looked at.
s.m. The fruit Eriobotrya japonica, the 'loquāt' (a native of China and Japan).
n. m. A fruit; Eriobotrya japonica , Wat.

ety: S. लोह+खण्डः; or Prk. लोहडो = S. लोह+रः
def: s.m. An iron tool, instrument, implement; — hardware; — old iron; pots and pans (a dialec. form of the word is lokhaṅḍ).
more: s. m. Tools, old ironpots, pans, hardware.

def: = H لوکهڙيا लोखड़िया lokhṛiyā (i.q. lokṛī, lūkṭī), s f. A fox.
= H لوکهڙي लोखड़ी lokhṛī (i.q. lokṛī, lūkṭī), s f. A fox.
= lokhṛī.
s.m. Name of a famous Eastern fabulist (supposed by many to be the same as Ӕsop); — a wise man.
more: n. m. 1. A famous eastern fabulist, the Ӕsop of the East. Waham kī dārū to Luqmān ke pās bhī nahīṅ . Prov. For the doubter even Luqman has no cure. 2. A wise man.
n. prop. A famous eastern fabulist (supposed to be the same as Ӕsop).
wety: Borrowed from Arabic لُقْمَان (luqmān).

def: s.f. (dialec.) A female servant, maid-servant, maid.
more: n. f. A female servant. Kanyāṅ ke māṛ nā, loknī ke buniyā! Bhoj. Prov. Not even congee for the bride, bring sweets for the maid!

def: s.m. = lugṛā, q.v. s.m. (f. -ī), Ragged or worn-out cloth; tatter; old clothes; (rustic) garment, wrapper, mantle, sheet (syn. lūgṛā, lokrā, kapṛā).
more: n. m. A boy; lad, esp. an attendant on a goddess. laukaṛiyā-bīr . n. m. An epithet of Bhairoṅ. kannyā laukṛā , n. m. A goddess and her attendant boy.

def: s.f. = lūkṭī, 'a wooden poker,' &c., q.v. s.f. A stake burnt at one end; a brand, &c. ( = lukāṭhī, q.v.); — a firebrand, mischief-maker, tell-tale (also written lūkṭī).

ety: Prk. लुक्कडिआ, rt. लुक्क = H. luk˚, see lūkṭī
def: s.f. A fox ( = lokhṛī).
s.f. The tongue; the uvula; — a name of Lakshmī, the goddess of fortune (as 'the fickle or changeable one'); — name of a rāgini or musical mode.
more: n. m. 1. The tongue of a bell. 2. A pendant for the ear. 3. The penis.
s. m. A suppository, a kind of solid clyster.
adj. (dakh.) Cripple ( Harris ): see لولا lūlā.

def: An ear-pendant; clapper (of a bell); a plummet; — penis; — a suppository, a kind of solid clyster.

adj. Shaking, tremulous, trembling; agitated; waving; unsteady, fickle; — s.m. Undulation; glimmer; — the fluid in which the eyes sometimes appear to be overwhelmed, tears; — a pendant; an ear-drop; a plummet
more: 1. adj. Shaking, tremulous. 2. s. m. Tears, the fluid in which the eyes appear sometimes to be overwhelmed, undulation, glimmer.
subs: (˚la+ar˚), s.m. A form of the sun.

def: s.m. Pendant, ear-drop, ear-ring; an ornament for the nose.
more: s. m. An earring, drop, pendant.

def: s.f. A lullaby, &c. ( = loṛī, q.v.). s.f. A kind of song, a lullaby
subs: (-ko), To sing a lullaby (to), to lull (a child to sleep).

def: s.f. A sort of dock or sorrel, Oxalis pusilla, or Rumex vesicarius.
s.f. A small ear-pendant; — lobe (of the ear).
(see لولک lolak ) s. (dakh.) Lobe (of the ear: Harris ).

ety: lol˚ = S. लोलय(ति), fr. caus. of rt. लुल्
def: v.t. To cause to shake or vibrate, to set in motion; to move, shake, wag.

(i.q. lolā, q.v.), s.m. Penis puerilis. adj. Shaking, tremulous, trembling; agitated; waving; unsteady, fickle; — s.m. Undulation; glimmer; — the fluid in which the eyes sometimes appear to be overwhelmed, tears; — a pendant; an ear-drop; a plummet
subs: (˚la+ar˚), s.m. A form of the sun.

def: adv. Very desirous, very eager, ardently longing (for), covetous, greedy, insatiable.
s.f. Eager desire or longing, covetousness, greed, cupidity, insatiableness; lust, lustfulness.
s.f. Eager desire or longing, covetousness, greed, cupidity, insatiableness; lust, lustfulness.
s.m. Base (of a triangle, &c.); — a picket, outpost, sentry.
s.m. Short hair; wool; down; — a hairy tail (as a horse's, &c.; see lūm)
more: s. m. 1. The hair of the body. 2. The base of a triangle, &c. 3. A piquet, outpost, or sentry.
subs: adj. & s.m. Having poisonous hair; — an animal (as a tiger, &c.) whose hair is supposed to be poisonous
s.m. Bristling of the hair of the body; horripilation; thrilling with delight; shuddering with horror.

def: adj. & s.m. corr. of next, q.v.

s.f. A fox; a female jackal; — name of a Śākinī or female divinity of an inferior class; an attendant on Durgā; — green vitriol; — Indian spikenard, Valeriana jatamansi; cowach, Carpopogon pruriens; the plant Leca hirta; orris root, &c.
adj. & s.m. (f. -ā), Hairy, woolly, downy, shaggy, bristly; covered with hair, &c.; made of hair; containing hair; woollen; — a ram, sheep; — name of a Rishi
s.f. A fox (lit. & fig.).
wety: Inherited from Sanskrit लोमटक (lomaṭaka).

def: n. f. S. लोमड़ी P. robāh 1. A fox. 1. Ḍareṅ lomṛī se, aur nām Sher khāṅ! Prov. 2. Lovā phir phir daras dikhāvā, Surabhī sanmukh shishuhin piāvā . A good omen. Rāmāyan. The fox repeatedly his face doth show, The calf in front its milk draws from the cow. 2. A cunning fellow.
